name: Zucchini Squash Burgers
recipeIngredient: 5 Zucchini (or any other variety of summer squash)
1 cup cornmeal, or flour, or soy powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini and place in a large pot with 1/2 cup water, adding enough squash to fill the pot. Steam over medium heat for 7 minutes, until soft.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat; add the garlic, onions, carrots, celery, and pepper. Sauté for 7 minutes, until vegetables are tender.
3. Drain the zucchini and mash well. Add the sauteed vegetables, tahini, seasonings, sesame seeds, sunflower seed meal, and cornmeal. The batter should be thick; add flour if needed.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Oil a cookie sheet. Using a tablespoon, make patties and place them on the sheet.
5. Bake for 8 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
